sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# After SPACE, the yellow T-shape reappeared at cols 51-59
# Black L-shape is at cols 27-35
# Let me try moving RIGHT to overlap the black L-shape with the yellow T-shape
# Yellow T-shape horizontal bar: cols 51-59
# Yellow T-shape vertical bar: cols 51-53
# Black L-shape horizontal bar: cols 27-35
# Black L-shape vertical bar: cols 33-35

# To align black horizontal bar with yellow horizontal bar (cols 51-59):
# Need black at cols 51-59, currently at 27-35
# Difference: 51 - 27 = 24 cols, at 3 cols per RIGHT move = 8 RIGHT moves

# Let me try 8 RIGHT moves
for i in range(8):
    result = action(['RIGHT'])
    if result.get('level_completed') or result.get('done') or result.get('game_over'):
        print(f"Level completed/game over after {i+1} RIGHT moves!")
        break

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nAfter RIGHT moves:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] == 40:
        print(f"  Black object: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"  Charcoal object: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 40:
        print(f"  Yellow T-shape: pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and 20 < n['pixels'] <= 40:
        print(f"  Yellow bar: pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check ASCII
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Right area ===")
for r in range(44, 54):
    print(f"Row {r}: '{ascii_lines[r][44:62]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
